Idioma.LB_SeleccioneElRegistroDeNominaQueDeseeV: Select the payroll registration that desire to verify:
Idioma.MSG_DeseaverificarLaRelacionDepago: Do you desires to verify the relation of payment?
Idioma.MSG_DeseaDevolverLaRelacionDePagoAlSiste: Do you desires to return the relation of payment to the payroll system?
